docket_entries.description: PRE-TRIAL CALENDAR SWEEP, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR OF SEP-23-2009, OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL OR JUDGMENT ON FILE AS TO ALL DEFENDANTS

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-29-2009 CONTINUED TO SEP-23-2009 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE JUL-29-2009 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $206.24 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT CUPPLES, JACK S
